hook.text: A user in Tokyo calls your API hosted in Virginia. The round trip adds 200 milliseconds of lag.

buildup.text: Edge functions run your code on servers distributed worldwide — close to each user, not in one region.

discovery.text: Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge Functions, and Deno Deploy are popular edge compute platforms.

twist.text: Edge functions have limits: smaller memory, shorter runtimes, and restricted access to databases.

climax.text: For personalization, authentication, and redirects, edge functions are transformatively fast.

punchline.text: Run code where your users are, not where your data center is.

quiz.question: What is the main benefit of edge functions?
options: Running code geographically close to users for lower latency
Storing data permanently at the edge of the network
Replacing all cloud data centers with local computers
